scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @smb-tech/logger-core && npm run build -w @smb-tech/logger-node && npm run build -w @smb-tech/logger-react
scripts.dev:backend-express: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @smb-tech/backend-express
scripts.dev:backend-next: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @smb-tech/backend-next
scripts.dev:react: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @smb-tech/react-demo
